name: aowei
tagline: Advanced Supercapacitor Solutions for Energy Storage
description: Aowei is a leading manufacturer of high-performance supercapacitors and energy storage solutions. Founded in 2008, the company specializes in electric double-layer capacitors (EDLC) and hybrid capacitors for automotive, industrial, and renewable energy applications.
longDescription:
Aowei Technology Co., Ltd. is a premier developer and manufacturer of supercapacitor technology, dedicated to advancing energy storage solutions for the modern world. With over 15 years of expertise in electrochemical capacitor design, Aowei has established itself as a trusted partner for industries requiring high-power density, rapid charge/discharge capabilities, and exceptional cycle life.

The company's product portfolio spans from small cylindrical cells to large modular systems, serving critical applications in electric vehicles, renewable energy storage, industrial automation, and smart grid infrastructure. Aowei's manufacturing facilities are certified to ISO 9001 and IATF 16949 standards, ensuring consistent quality and reliability.

As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support, application engineering services, and reliable supply chain management for Aowei's complete supercapacitor product line.

coreProducts.name: Cylindrical Supercapacitors
coreProducts.description: Standard cylindrical EDLC cells ranging from 1F to 3000F, ideal for backup power and pulse power applications

coreProducts.name: Prismatic Supercapacitors
coreProducts.description: Compact prismatic cells designed for space-constrained applications with high energy density

coreProducts.name: Module Systems
coreProducts.description: Integrated supercapacitor modules with active balancing and thermal management for system-level solutions

coreProducts.name: Hybrid Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Lithium-ion hybrid capacitors combining high energy density with high power density characteristics

industries.name: Electric Vehicles
industries.description: Regenerative braking systems, start-stop applications, and peak power assist for EVs and HEVs

industries.name: Renewable Energy
industries.description: Grid stabilization, wind turbine pitch control, and solar energy storage systems

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: UPS systems, automated guided vehicles, and industrial robotics power backup

industries.name: Smart Grid
industries.description: Microgrid energy management, voltage regulation, and power quality improvement

industries.name: Consumer Electronics
industries.description: Portable devices, wireless equipment, and IoT sensor power management

certifications.name: ISO 9001:2015
certifications.description: Quality Management System certification ensuring consistent product quality

certifications.name: IATF 16949:2016
certifications.description: Automotive Quality Management System for automotive industry applications

certifications.name: RoHS Compliant
certifications.description: Restriction of Hazardous Substances compliance for environmental protection

certifications.name: UL Recognized
certifications.description: UL recognition for safety standards compliance

seoDescription: Authorized Aowei supercapacitor distributor. High-performance EDLC, hybrid capacitors & module systems for EV, renewable energy & industrial applications.

faqs.question: Is BeiLuo an authorized distributor of Aowei supercapacitors?
faqs.answer: Yes, BeiLuo Electronics is an officially authorized distributor of Aowei Technology Co., Ltd. Our partnership provides customers with guaranteed authentic products, competitive pricing, and direct technical support from Aowei's engineering team. As an authorized distributor, we maintain comprehensive inventory of Aowei's supercapacitor product lines including cylindrical cells, prismatic cells, and integrated module systems. We provide full technical documentation, application engineering support, and reliable supply chain management for all Aowei products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to verify our current distributor certificate and discuss your supercapacitor requirements. We can provide immediate stock availability and technical documentation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Aowei supercapacitors compared to other brands?
faqs.answer: Aowei supercapacitors offer several distinct competitive advantages. First, their proprietary activated carbon electrode technology delivers industry-leading energy density up to 10 Wh/kg while maintaining exceptional power density. Second, Aowei's advanced manufacturing processes ensure consistent cell-to-cell matching, critical for module applications. Third, their products feature extended operating temperature ranges from -40°C to +65°C, outperforming many competitors. Fourth, Aowei provides comprehensive technical support including custom module design services. Finally, their competitive pricing combined with BeiLuo's local inventory and support creates an excellent total cost of ownership proposition for customers.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request a comparison datasheet showing Aowei specifications side-by-side with competing brands for your specific application requirements.

faqs.question: What industries and applications are Aowei supercapacitors best suited for?
faqs.answer: Aowei supercapacitors excel in applications requiring high power density, rapid charge/discharge cycles, and long operational life. In automotive, they are ideal for regenerative braking systems, start-stop applications, and peak power assist in hybrid vehicles. For renewable energy, they provide grid stabilization, smooth power output from solar and wind installations, and pitch control for wind turbines. Industrial applications include UPS systems, automated guided vehicles (AGVs), and robotics power backup. Smart grid deployments benefit from their microgrid energy management and voltage regulation capabilities. Consumer electronics applications include portable devices and IoT sensor power management where battery replacement is impractical.
faqs.decisionGuide: Describe your specific application requirements to our FAE team, and we will recommend the optimal Aowei product configuration including cell type, module design, and balancing circuitry.

faqs.question: What certifications do Aowei supercapacitors hold for quality assurance?
faqs.answer: Aowei maintains comprehensive quality certifications ensuring product reliability and safety. Their ISO 9001:2015 certification demonstrates robust quality management systems throughout the manufacturing process. The IATF 16949:2016 certification specifically addresses automotive industry requirements, making their products suitable for critical vehicle applications. ISO 14001:2015 environmental management certification ensures sustainable manufacturing practices. All products are RoHS compliant, meeting environmental protection standards by restricting hazardous substances. Additionally, key products carry UL recognition for safety compliance. These certifications, combined with rigorous in-house testing including 100% capacitance and ESR screening, ensure consistent quality and reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request certification documents and reliability test reports for your quality audit. We can provide complete documentation packages including PPAP where required for automotive applications.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Aowei supercapacitor for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the optimal Aowei supercapacitor requires evaluating several key parameters. First, determine your energy storage requirement in watt-hours and power requirement in watts. Second, consider the operating voltage range - Aowei offers cells from 2.7V to 3.0V nominal, with modules available up to hundreds of volts. Third, evaluate the operating temperature range and environmental conditions. Fourth, assess the required cycle life - Aowei products offer 500,000 to 1,000,000 cycles depending on the series. Fifth, consider physical constraints including available space and mounting requirements. Sixth, determine if you need individual cells or a complete module with balancing and monitoring. BeiLuo's FAE team can assist with calculations for capacitance, voltage balancing, and thermal management.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team with your application specifications including voltage, current, energy requirements, and environmental conditions. We will provide a detailed selection report with recommended part numbers.

faqs.question: What technical support does BeiLuo provide for Aowei supercapacitor integration?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support for Aowei supercapacitor integration. Our services include application engineering support with detailed technical consultations, circuit design recommendations, and thermal analysis. We offer custom module design services including cell selection, voltage balancing circuit design, and mechanical packaging. Our FAE team provides simulation support for charge/discharge profiles and lifetime prediction. We conduct application-specific testing and validation including environmental testing and accelerated life testing. Additionally, we offer on-site technical training for customer engineering teams and manufacturing support for high-volume applications. All support is backed by direct access to Aowei's senior engineering team for complex technical challenges.
faqs.decisionGuide: Schedule a technical consultation with our FAE team to discuss your project requirements. We can provide reference designs, simulation models, and application notes to accelerate your development.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time and MOQ for Aowei supercapacitors?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo Electronics maintains extensive inventory of standard Aowei supercapacitor products at our distribution centers, enabling immediate shipment for many popular models. For standard cylindrical cells in the 100F to 3000F range, we typically stock 4-8 weeks of inventory. Standard prismatic cells and common module configurations are also available from stock. For non-stock items or large volume orders, standard lead time is 8-12 weeks from order confirmation. Minimum order quantities vary by product: individual cells typically have MOQ of 100-500 pieces depending on capacitance value, while custom modules may require minimum orders of 50-100 units. We offer flexible scheduling agreements and consignment inventory programs for high-volume customers to ensure continuous supply.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team with your forecasted volumes and delivery requirements. We can propose inventory programs including safety stock and scheduled deliveries to optimize your supply chain.
